message:
Running command: 
# Strategy: Re-run DRT again with a CONTINUOUS pipe drainer to prevent the deadlock.
# The run will re-run DRT from scratch (using the same pre-DRT ODB from step 67).
# This time we keep the pipe drained constantly.

MCU_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"
DESIGN="mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper"

echo "=== Starting DRT re-run WITH pipe drainer at $(date) ==="

# Start LibreLane with --last-run (uses wrapper_run tag, steps from DRT onward)
cd "$MCU_DIR/openlane/${DESIGN}"

# Launch librelane in background with output to file
nohup librelane \
  --pdk-root /nc/apps/pdk \
  --pdk sky130A \
  --last-run \
  -F OpenROAD.DetailedRouting \
  config.json \
  > /tmp/librelane_drt2.log 2>&1 &
LR_PID=$!
echo "LibreLane PID: $LR_PID"

# Wait a moment for librelane to start and spawn OpenROAD
sleep 10
echo "=== Checking initial state ==="
ps aux | grep -E "(openroad|librelane)" | grep -v grep | awk '{print "PID:"$2, "CMD:"$11, "CPU:"$3"%"}'

# Find the LibreLane python process
LIBPID=$(ps aux | grep "librelane.*config.json" | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
echo "LibreLane PID: $LIBPID"

function.name: execute_bash
